pi_items.source: task.json description (line 5): 'log in as admin / adminpass123'

privileged_info_summary: The add_pilot task uses Aerobridge, an open-source drone fleet management system (https://github.com/openskies-sh/aerobridge). The task requires adding a synthetic test pilot with first name 'Aditya', last name 'Kumar', and email 'aditya.kumar@droneops.in' to a local Django admin interface at http://localhost:8000/admin/registry/pilot/add/. Authentication credentials are admin username 'admin' and password 'adminpass123'. The email domain 'droneops.in' does not appear to be a real registered domain and is used for synthetic test purposes. The phone number format example '+919876543210' is valid Indian phone format (+91 country code followed by 10 digits). The setup_task.sh script removes any pre-existing Aditya Kumar records before task execution, and the export_result.sh script verifies the Person and Pilot records were created during the task.
